underlying_goal: Resume project context and create planning phases to close gaps identified in a milestone audit
friction_detail: Claude created gap closure as a new v1.15 milestone when user considered v1.14 still incomplete; user had to correct this.
brief_summary: User wanted to plan gap closure phases for their v1.14 milestone audit; after a minor correction about milestone numbering, Claude created 4 phases with directories and roadmap updates.
